# Infrastructure costs

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/refresh-docs.mjs from docs/costs.config.json.
     Edit the config, not this file. -->

What it costs to run the experiment. **This project has no customers, no plan
price, and no revenue** — so there is no margin model here, deliberately.

## Assumptions

These drive every number below. If one is wrong, the totals are wrong.

| Assumption | Value |
|---|---:|
| Trading days per month | 21 |
| Cycles per trading day | 2 |
| Active portfolios | 1 |
| **Cycles per month** | **42** |

_Two scheduled cycles per trading day: 10:00 AM ET decisions and 3:30 PM ET exit-only. Cycle count scales with active portfolios sharing one market-data fetch._

## Variable costs

| Service | Per unit | Unit | Cycles/mo | Monthly |
|---|---:|---|---:|---:|
| Anthropic — Claude Sonnet ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 | trading cycle | 42 | $0.00 |
| **Total variable** | | | | **$0.00** |

## Fixed costs

| Service | Monthly | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| Railway — backend service ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 |  |
| Railway — frontend service ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 |  |
| Supabase — Postgres + Auth ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 | Confirm which tier. |
| Alpha Vantage — news ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 | Believed free tier; rate-limit behaviour observed 2026-07-22 is consistent with that. Confirm. |
| Finnhub — earnings, profiles ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 | Confirm tier. |
| Alpaca — paper trading ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 | Paper account; market data tier may carry a cost. |
| Domain — bahtzang.com ⚠️ VERIFY | $0.00 | Annual registration, divided by 12. |
| **Total fixed** | **$0.00** | |
